data.title: Chapter 1: Technology & Communication
data.description: Exploring the impact of modern technologies on daily communication.

data.title: Vocabulary: Digital World
data.summary: Mots et expressions liés au monde du digital.

contentSections.title: 1. Key Vocabulary
contentSections.body:
Here are some essential words: 
- Device: Un appareil
- Network: Un réseau
- To browse: Naviguer (sur internet)

contentSections.title: 2. Expressions
contentSections.body:
- To keep in touch: Rester en contact
- To be addicted to: Être accro à

miniQuiz.explanation: To browse the web signifie naviguer sur internet.
